title: Empty state
description: Centered placeholder for empty lists, tables and panels. Icon tile + title + one-line description, with an optional CTA. Use a primary CTA when the user can create the first item here; drop the CTA when the data fills in elsewhere.

variants.label: Con CTA primario
variants.description: First-run state where the user can create the first item right here. Uses .btn.pri with an action verb (e.g. 'Crear primer reporte'). One primary action per empty state.

variants.label: Con CTA secundario
variants.description: Lower-emphasis action — adjust a filter, change a date range, or a non-creation alternative. Uses .btn.sec.

variants.label: Sin CTA (informativo)
variants.description: Data is populated elsewhere (another form, an automated process, or a permission the user lacks). Icon + title + description only — no button.

variants.label: Compacto (inline)
variants.description: Reduced padding and smaller icon for small panels or sections inside a card. Add the .compact modifier.

variants.label: Sin resultados (búsqueda)
variants.description: Search or filter returned nothing. Uses a subtle .btn.sub action to clear filters and recover.

code:
Sin reportes programados

Crea un reporte programado para recibirlo por correo.

…
/* ── CSS ── */ .dt-empty{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:10px;padding:48px 24px} .dt-empty.compact{padding:28px 20px;gap:8px} .dt-empty-icon{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--n2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--n45);flex-shrink:0} .dt-empty.compact .dt-empty-icon{width:36px;height:36px} .dt-empty-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;fill:currentColor;stroke:none} .dt-empty.compact .dt-empty-icon svg{width:18px;height:18px} .dt-empty-ttl{font:700 14px var(--font-sans);color:var(--n7)} .dt-empty-desc{font:400 13px/1.5 var(--font-sans);color:var(--n5);max-width:280px} .dt-empty .btn{margin-top:6px}
pageUsage:
Source: sections/components/empty-state.json
Used in: DES-827 Profile Settings (Reportes programados, Acceso y usuarios)

Guidance:
- WITH CTA: the user can create the first item from here. One primary action (.btn.pri) with an action verb.
- WITHOUT CTA: data is populated elsewhere or the user lacks permission. Icon + title + description only.
- Title: short noun phrase describing what's missing ('Sin reportes programados').
- Description: one line, explains how the area gets populated. Max-width 280px.
- Icon: always IBM Carbon, fill (never stroke), color var(--n45) inside an n2 tile.
- Compact modifier for small panels/cards inside a layout.
